Student Services

Accessibility and Disability Service (ADS)

301-314-7682 ads.umd.edu

The Accessibility and Disability Service (ADS) facilitates the establishment of reason- able accommodations for qualified individu- als. For assistance in obtaining accommoda- tions, contact the Accessibility & Disability Service (ADS) at 301-314-7682, or adsfront- desk@umd.edu.

Student Affairs, and the larger university community. Areas of research include student development, basic needs, well-being, and retention; multiculturalism and social justice; as well as clinical service delivery. Design, implementation, and analysis of the bi- annual University New Student Census, the Withdrawal Survey, and the Food Access & Student Well-being Study are the Research Unit’s primary responsibilities.
